mapper.sql: select w.warehouse_id, w.warehouse_code, w.warehouse_name, w.warehouse_kind, w.country_code, w.state_province, w.city, w.postal_code, w.address_line1, w.address_line2, w.contact_name, w.contact_phone, w.contact_email, w.company_name, w.settlement_currency, w.status, w.create_by, w.create_time, w.update_by, w.update_time, w.remark, tp.seller_id, s.seller_no, s.seller_code, s.seller_name, s.seller_short_name, p.warehouse_pairing_id, p.connection_code, p.upstream_warehouse_code, p.upstream_warehouse_name, p.status as pairing_status, uc.master_warehouse_name from warehouse w left join third_party_warehouse tp on tp.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id left join seller s on s.seller_id = tp.seller_id left join upstream_system_warehouse_pairing p on p.system_warehouse_code = w.warehouse_code left join upstream_system_connection uc on uc.connection_code = p.connection_code
mapper.update: update warehouse set warehouse_name = #{warehouseName}, country_code = #{countryCode}, state_province = #{stateProvince}, city = #{city}, postal_code = #{postalCode}, address_line1 = #{addressLine1}, address_line2 = #{addressLine2}, contact_name = #{contactName}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, contact_email = #{contactEmail}, company_name = #{companyName}, settlement_currency = #{settlementCurrency}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), remark = #{remark} where warehouse_id = #{warehouseId}
update warehouse set status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where warehouse_id = #{warehouseId}
mapper.insert: insert into official_warehouse(warehouse_id, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{warehouseId}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
insert into third_party_warehouse(warehouse_id, seller_id, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{warehouseId}, #{sellerId}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.select:
select state_id, state_code, state_name, status from us_state where status = '0'
and ( lower(state_name) like concat('%', lower(#{keyword}), '%') or lower(state_code) like concat('%', lower(#{keyword}), '%') )
order by state_name asc limit 100

select city_id, place_geoid, state_code, state_name, city_name, place_name, place_type, status from us_city where status = '0'
and ( lower(state_name) = lower(#{stateName}) or lower(state_code) = lower(#{stateName}) )
and ( lower(city_name) like concat('%', lower(#{keyword}), '%') or lower(place_name) like concat('%', lower(#{keyword}), '%') )
order by state_name asc, city_name asc, place_type asc, place_geoid asc limit 100

select concat(seller_code, ' - ', seller_short_name) as label, seller_id as value, seller_code as code, seller_name as name, concat(seller_no, ' ', seller_code, ' ', seller_name, ' ', seller_short_name) as search_text from seller where status = '0'
and ( seller_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or seller_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or seller_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or seller_short_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
order by seller_code asc, seller_id asc limit 100
